creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 195933
py-django_openstack_auth-3.6.1.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-django_openstack_auth to 3.6.1 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/openstack/django_openstack_auth/compare/3.1.0...3.6.1

Changes to the port:
- added LICENSE_FILE
- sorted variables a bit according to PHB

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (10.4-, 11.1-, 11.2-RELEASE, 12.0-CURRENT @r337160) for each amd64 + i386 arch and each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
